t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    res = []
    max_a_idx = max(range(n), key=lambda x: a[x])
    max_b_idx = max(range(n), key=lambda x: b[x])
    
    for i in range(n):

        for j in range(n):

                # j is unbeatable by others if j has max_a and max_b among others

                if ma == j and mb == j:

                    break
        res.append('1' if can_win else '0')

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    result = []
    for i in range(n):
        ai, bi = a[i], b[i]
        # Find players i cannot beat
        # i can beat j if ai > aj or bi > bj
        # i cannot beat j if ai < aj AND bi < bj
        can_win = True
        for j in range(n):
            if i == j:
                continue
            if a[i] < a[j] and b[i] < b[j]:
                # i cannot beat j, need someone in S to beat j
                # S = players i can beat
                found = False
                for k in range(n):
                    if k == i or k == j:
                        continue
                    # k in S: i can beat k
                    if a[i] > a[k] or b[i] > b[k]:
                        # k can beat j
                        if a[k] > a[j] or b[k] > b[j]:
                            found = True
                            break
                if not found:
                    can_win = False
                    break
        result.append('1' if can_win else '0')
    print(''.join(result))

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()
